title: thekaveh/NNx
summary: Lightweight PyTorch toolkit for training, fine-tuning, and exporting modern neural nets. FFN + GNN + decoder-only LM + diffusion + JEPA + MoE; PEFT (LoRA/DoRA/IA3/Prefix/Prompt), PTQ/QAT, pruning, surgery; ONNX/GGUF/Ollama/HuggingFace Hub interop. Dataclass-configured runs with fluent builders, automatic checkpointing, and Plotly viz.
